title:
AN ACT  CHANGING THE  NAME OF BARRIO CAWAYANON   IN   THE
MUNICIPALITY OF VALENCIA, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO VINTAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11996 / 65 OG No. 23, 5823 (June 9, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5289, June 15, 1968 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BARRIO CAWAYANON IN THE

MUNICIPALITY OF VALENCIA, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON, TO VINTAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in

Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Barrio Cawayanon in the Municipality of Valencia, Province of Bukidnon, is hereby changed to Vintar.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 15, 1968.
